metadata.description: Cross-P&ID super graph for POC P&IDs 006, 007, 008

connectivity_summary.process_flow_description: These three P&IDs represent a pipeline receiving and gas conditioning sequence. pid-006 handles the incoming pipeline and scraper launcher area (DS-3), feeding into pid-007 which contains the scraper receiver (361-V004) and processes the received fluid. pid-007 then connects to pid-008, which hosts the fuel gas knock-out drum (PP01-362-V001) and handles downstream condensate and fuel gas routing to treatment and storage.

key_connections.description: Condensate from the scraper receiver area (pid-007) is routed to the Condensate Storage Vessel, which is referenced in pid-008, linking the two P&IDs via the condensate outlet stream.

isolated_terminators: pid-006: FUEL GAS N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0049 (references external P&ID 0049, no match in provided set)
pid-006: FROM DS-3 NEW PCV STATION N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0003 (references external P&ID 0003, no match in provided set)
pid-006: TO SAFE LOCATION (no matching destination in provided P&IDs)
pid-006: TO CORROSION INHIBITOR INJECTION PUMP (no matching destination in provided P&IDs)
pid-006: 2"-IA-DS03-20-0800-S01N1B / FROM DS-3 STATION DISTRIBUTION HEADER (no matching source in provided P&IDs)
pid-006: DS-3 NEW KOD AREA (no matching P&ID in provided set)
pid-006: TO LAUNCHER AND CI SKID AREA (no matching destination in provided P&IDs)
pid-006: TO SCRAPER RECEIVER (DS-3) (likely connects to pid-007 FROM SCRAPER LAUNCHER ref, but not formally matched in inter-P&ID connections list)
pid-006: TO DS-3 CLOSED DRAIN SYSTEM (no matching destination in provided P&IDs)
pid-006: Main pipeline continues downward (continuation ref, no matching P&ID in provided set)
